items.title: ITCEN Global, Korea Gold Exchange, and Korea Gold Exchange Digital Asset gold RWA business watch item
items.summary: Publicly discussed KGLD messaging can be framed around ITCEN Global, Korea Gold Exchange, and Korea Gold Exchange Digital Asset pursuing a gold-based Web3/RWA direction. Treat this as a conservative content seed until the original article URL is confirmed.
items.caution: Do not state issuance completion, exchange listing, active trading, or finalized commercial launch unless the source explicitly confirms it.

items.title: KGLD planned issuance / commercialization timing watch item
items.summary: KGLD can be described as a real-gold-based RWA project under preparation when using conservative wording such as 'according to reports' or 'planned'.
items.caution: Use 'plan', 'reported plan', or 'preparation' language. Do not imply completed issuance, live redemption, or exchange availability.

items.title: LayerZero / KorDA / KGLD multichain expansion watch item
items.summary: LayerZero-related messaging may support a multichain direction for tokenized assets, but KGLD claims should stay within the range of confirmed public materials.
items.caution: Do not imply KGLD is already active on every chain or that integrations are fully launched without a confirmed source.

items.title: Gold Standard Wallet / gold-backed financial service concept watch item
items.summary: KGLD messaging can connect gold-backed tokens with broader gold-based financial service concepts, while avoiding claims about finalized yield, loan, or banking terms.
items.caution: Do not describe interest, yield, lending, or guaranteed benefits as finalized service terms unless official documents confirm them.

newsNarrative.headline: KGLD는 실물 금 기반 RWA 사업 구상과 온체인 운영 데이터를 함께 설명할 수 있는 콘텐츠 구간입니다.
newsNarrative.keyMessage: 공개 자료와 보도 기반 메시지는 '추진', '준비', '검증 가능성' 중심으로 보수적으로 정리하는 것이 적절합니다.
newsNarrative.kgldAngle: 뉴스 맥락은 KGLD의 사업 방향성을 설명하고, 온체인 데이터는 현재 운영 상태를 보조하는 근거로만 사용합니다.
doNotOverclaim: 상장 완료 또는 거래 가능 표현
